texto: How to fish a jerkbait. There's no wrong way to do it. You can fish it fast, or you can fish it slow. If the bite is slow, I'll add a lot of pauses between twitches. If the bite is good, I'll retrieve it really fast with multiple twitches. One good tip is, if you're fishing with a current, you want to retrieve it really fast. And if there's no current, you can take your time and add multiple pauses between twitches. Give these tips a try, and good luck!

One good tip is, if you're fishing with a current, you want to retrieve it really fast.
And if there's no current, you can take your time and add multiple pauses between twitches.
Give these tips a try, and good luck!
